evaluation.summary: Mitigating truncation effects shows the primorial gap variance-to-mean ratio follows a power-law with exponent approx 2.19, essentially matching a logarithmic trend.
next_directions: Extend the analysis to larger primorial indices to resolve the exponent ambiguity
Apply formal model selection criteria (e.g., AIC, BIC) to compare power-law and logarithmic fits
Develop a theoretical framework linking primorial gaps to known number-theoretic distributions
